name: about_page_9_pages_aboutus

observed_strengths.observation: Strong brand story with a differentiating 'Veteran owned' credential and a mindfulness/wellness mission ('every sip is a reminder to slow down')
Newsletter 'Subscribe' capture present on the page, converting brand-interested readers into the email list

missing_or_weak.observation: About page tells the story but contains no CTA back into the catalog or featured products to convert engaged readers
The 'Veteran owned' and ethically-sourced trust signals are not echoed on PDPs or cart where purchase decisions happen

purchase_path_notes: About page builds trust but is a funnel dead-end with no path back to products; its trust cues are siloed from the buying surfaces.
